message:
web: Filter repos dropdown to only show accessible repos

Changed getRepos to use innerJoin with buildVisibilityCondition so
users only see repos from transcripts they can access (own + public
from team members + team-shared), instead of all repos in the database.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/wyinlwtf3zywdblqovnu1qdo
